# Project structure for fraudia-claims

# Directories:
# ├─ data/
# │   ├─ raw/          # raw synthetic CSVs (generated by scripts)
# │   └─ processed/    # cleaned/feature engineered data
# ├─ scripts/           # helper scripts (data generation, ETL)
# ├─ notebooks/         # exploratory notebooks (run in Colab)
# ├─ src/               # Python package source
# │   ├─ __init__.py
# │   ├─ ingestion/
# │   │   └─ load_data.py
# │   ├─ features/
# │   │   └─ build_features.py
# │   ├─ rules/
# │   │   └─ fraud_rules.py
# │   ├─ models/
# │   │   └─ fraud_model.py
# │   ├─ explainability/
# │   │   └─ explain_score.py
# │   ├─ ai_agent/
# │   │   └─ claims_agent.py
# │   └─ app/
# │       └─ main.py   # Streamlit entry point
# ├─ docs/              # documentation markdown files
# ├─ tests/             # unit tests
# └─ presentation/      # pitch assets

# This file documents the intended layout; actual files will be created separately.
